    "description": "V3 of 3 children under epic ddx-53c96967. Depends on V1 (ddx-c5dce902); benefits from but does not block on V2.\n\nGenerate two classes of visuals:\n\nA) TECHNICAL DIAGRAMS (SVG or Mermaid, committed alongside docs):\n- Three-layer stack: DDx (platform) ↔ HELIX (workflow) ↔ Dun (quality). Show how a workflow tool consumes DDx primitives.\n- Bead lifecycle: open → ready → in_progress → closed (with review, push-conflict, declined branches).\n- Execute-loop flow: claim bead → render prompt → run agent → review → merge/push (auto-recover on race) → close.\n- Persona/role binding: roles in workflow (e.g. code-reviewer) → persona definitions in library → project binding in .ddx/config.yaml.\n- Project-local install model: \u003cprojectRoot\u003e/.ddx/plugins/\u003cplugin\u003e/, \u003cprojectRoot\u003e/.agents/skills/, \u003cprojectRoot\u003e/.claude/skills/ all real-files; ddx-server is the only global artifact.\n\nPlace SVGs at website/static/diagrams/\u003cname\u003e.svg or use Mermaid code blocks inside markdown. Wire them into the microsite concept pages where V2 left placeholders.\n\nB) HERO GRAPHIC (raster, polished, for the microsite landing page):\n- Use the nano-banana-pro-openrouter skill to generate a hero image.\n- Subject: visual metaphor for document-driven development with AI agents. Suggest: a structured document tree feeding into agent workflows, not generic 'AI' clip art. The user explicitly wants something distinctive, not generic AI aesthetic.\n- 2K output minimum. Multiple variants OK; pick the strongest.\n- Place at website/static/hero/landing.png (or .webp for size).\n- Wire into website/content/_index.md or wherever the landing hero is rendered.\n\nPREREQUISITES:\n- Set OPENROUTER_API_KEY in env or .env to use the nano-banana skill.\n- If the API key isn't available, this bead creates the SVG diagrams and prepares the prompt + integration point for the hero, then declines the hero portion with a clear blocker note.\n\nOUT OF SCOPE: animations, video, anything interactive. Static SVG/PNG only.",

input.content:
# URL redirect map for the website-reorg nav change (bead ddx-8c166626).
#
# Format: each entry maps an old path (removed/renamed) to its new
# destination. Consumed by Hugo aliases (see layouts/_default/redirect.html
# or per-page `aliases:` front matter) and by any deploy-time redirect
# generator. Keep this file in sync when nav or content paths move.
redirects:
  - from: /docs/
    to: /why/
  - from: /docs/concepts/
    to: /why/
  - from: /docs/concepts/principles/
    to: /why/
  - from: /docs/concepts/architecture/
    to: /why/
  - from: /docs/concepts/glossary/
    to: /why/
  - from: /docs/skills/
    to: /features/
  - from: /docs/plugins/
    to: /features/
  - from: /docs/cli/
    to: /docs/cli/
  - from: /docs/ecosystem/
    to: /docs/ecosystem/
